result.warning_text: Access denied. You do not have permission to view this. For more on scraping GitHub and how it may affect your rights, please review our Terms of Service (https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/github-terms/github-terms-of-service)
result.warning_format: Yellow warning box in chat bubble area with triangle warning icon

observations.baseline_test: Benign prompt 'hello test' responded normally - Copilot functional
observations.block_test: Prompt with Korean PII (주민번호 123456-7890123) triggered Etap APF block
observations.response_behavior: 403 Forbidden block response rendered as yellow warning box by Copilot UI
observations.spinner_after_warning: Loading spinner appeared below warning, suggesting Copilot retry attempt
observations.warning_persistence: Warning remained visible and stable after 15+ seconds

notes: Build #23 blocking confirmed working. 403 Forbidden response is rendered as yellow warning box by GitHub Copilot UI. Block effective for Korean PII pattern.
